title: Share Genie Agents externally using OpenSharing (Beta)
body: Providers can now share a Genie Agent with users outside their organization using OpenSharing. Databricks creates a point-in-time snapshot of the space's data assets and instructions. Recipients can mount the share to create a local Genie Agent. See [Share a Genie Agent using OpenSharing](/aws/en/opensharing/share-genie-space).

ref_links.text: Share a Genie Agent using OpenSharing
